name: craft-workflow
description: An opinionated workflow for non-code deliverables. A domain-neutral method — discovery → sign-off → criteria-first → produce → review loop — with packs for experience-design (UI/UX, journeys, accessibility), content (long-form, UX copy, SEO), and research (evidence, synthesis). It supplies the method and concrete acceptance rubrics, and orchestrates existing skills (frontend-design, marketingskills, deep-research, plannotator, grill-me) rather than reinventing them. No commit hook — enforcement is the agent-run sign-off gates and review loop.
